title: Verify Remind Me option appears in pause and cancel pop-ups
description: Test that the 'Remind Later' option is available in both pause confirmation and cancel confirmation pop-ups

steps.description: 1. Click Pause Trial and verify 'Remind Later' option in pop-up
3. Verify 'Remind Later' option in cancel pop-up

expected_result: Both pause and cancel pop-ups include 'Remind Later' option that returns user to Trial Corner with reminder enabled
